name: Moliang Zhou
summary: Machine learning platform leader with 10 years spanning AI infrastructure and applied research. Bridges frontier AI and pragmatic engineering, turning ambiguous mandates into architecture and leading teams from 0-to-1 to org-wide platforms — with deep expertise across the model lifecycle: development, serving, and inference.
